basic_details.job_title: NIT Mizoram Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Mizoram (NIT Mizoram)
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Mizoram (NIT Mizoram) has officially announced the Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 with 4 openings. Candidates holding a Ph.D. in the relevant or equivalent discipline along with First Class in M.E./M.Tech and B.E./B.Tech are eligible to apply for these temporary positions. Interested candidates can submit their applications through email on or before 10 July 2026. The detailed notification, released under Advt. No. NITZM/R-2-17/TF/2026/1263, contains complete information regarding eligibility, selection process, and application procedure. Direct links t

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in the relevant or equivalent discipline and shall have First Class in M.E/M.Tech and B.E/B.Tech
qualification.details: Temporary Faculty (ECE): Ph.D. in Electronics & Communication Engineering or equivalent, with First Class in M.E/M.Tech and B.E/B.Tech. Temporary Faculty (EE): Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering or equivalent, with First Class in M.E/M.Tech and B.E/B.Tech. Temporary Faculty (CSE): Ph.D. in Computer Science & Engineering or equivalent, with First Class in M.E/M.Tech and B.E/B.Tech. Temporary Faculty (CE): Ph.D. in Civil Engineering or equivalent, with First Class in M.E/M.Tech and B.E/B.Tech.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Mizoram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Mizoram Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.national_institute_of_technology_mizoram: Ph.D. in the relevant or equivalent discipline and shall have First Class in M.E/M.Tech and B.E/B.Tech

content_sections.heading: NIT Mizoram Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Mizoram Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Mizoram Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Mizoram Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Temporary Faculty (ECE): Ph.D. in Electronics & Communication Engineering or equivalent, with First Class in M.E/M.Tech and B.E/B.Tech. Temporary Faculty (EE): Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering or equivalent, with First Class in M.E/M.Tech and B.E/B.Tech. Temporary Faculty (CSE): Ph.D. in Computer Science & Engineering or equivalent, with First Class in M.E/M.Tech and B.E/B.Tech. Temporary Faculty (CE): Ph.D. in Civil Engineering or equivalent, with First Class in M.E/M.Tech and B.E/B.Tech.

content_sections.heading: NIT Mizoram Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

rows.event: Last date for submission of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Mizoram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Mizoram Temporary Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 10th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the recruitment email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Temporary Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in the relevant discipline and have secured First Class in both their M.E/M.Tech and B.E/B.Tech degrees.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Temporary Faculty at NIT Mizoram?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for Temporary Faculty positions across different departments.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Temporary Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 70,000.00 (Fixed) per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the designated recruitment email address.

faq.question: Q6. Which departments are recruiting Temporary Faculty?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Temporary Faculty positions in Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE), Electrical Engineering (EE), Computer Science & Engineering (CSE), and Civil Engineering (CE).

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for NIT Mizoram Temporary Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC/SC/ST/EWS candidates need to pay Rs. 500, while SC/ST/EWS candidates pay Rs. 200. Women and PwDs are exempted.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial application screening followed by an interview, which may be conducted in a hybrid mode.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for NIT Mizoram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of NIT Mizoram?
faq.answer: The official website of the National Institute of Technology Mizoram is www.nitmz.ac.in, which is also provided in the 'Important Links' section.
